JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 519 ELLIS,#519 S.F, CA. - $289.30 RENT & DAMAGES - $117.55 COSTS - RENTAL AGREEMENT FORFEITED. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODGERS, BENNETT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 519 ELLIS ST, #519, S.F, CA. $289.30 RENT, $117.55 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $406.85, LEASE FORFEITED
